UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the FitCoin application, storing their unique identifier, wallet address, and aggregated fitness statistics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

walletAddress.description: The user's unique blockchain wallet address, used for authentication and token transfers.

username.description: An optional display name chosen by the user or derived from their wallet address.

totalFitCoinsEarned.description: The cumulative total of FIT tokens ever earned by the user across all activities.

totalFitCoinsSpent.description: The cumulative total of FIT tokens ever spent by the user in the rewards shop.

totalWorkouts.description: The total count of workout sessions logged by the user.

currentDailyStreak.description: The number of consecutive days the user has logged at least one workout.

longestDailyStreak.description: The highest number of consecutive workout days ever achieved by the user.

lastWorkoutDate.description: The date and time of the user's most recently logged workout.

lastLoginDate.description: The date and time the user last accessed the application, used for general activity tracking.

unlockedAchievementIds.description: An array of IDs referencing Achievement entities that the user has unlocked. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N Achievement)

monthlyChallengeProgress.description: A numerical value indicating the user's progress in the current monthly challenge, typically a percentage or specific target metric.

Workout.title: Workout
Workout.description: Records the details of a single workout session logged by a user, including type, duration, and tokens earned.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Workout entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who logged this workout. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Workout)

type.description: The category or type of workout, e.g., 'Cardio', 'Strength Training', 'Yoga'.

durationMinutes.description: The duration of the workout session in minutes.

date.description: The date and time when the workout was logged.

fitCoinsEarnedBase.description: The base amount of FIT tokens earned for the workout duration, before any bonuses are applied.

bonusesApplied.description: A list of descriptive strings for any bonus rules that applied to this workout (e.g., 'Early Bird', 'Weekend Workout').

fitCoinsEarnedTotal.description: The total amount of FIT tokens awarded for this workout, including base earnings and all applicable bonuses.

transactionHash.description: The blockchain transaction hash confirming the transfer of FIT tokens for this workout.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Defines an item available for purchase in the FitCoin rewards shop.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

category.description: The category the product belongs to, e.g., 'Nutrition', 'Equipment', 'Apparel', 'Training'.

priceFitCoins.description: The cost of the product in FIT tokens.

emoji.description: An emoji representation or icon for the product.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to an image of the product.

Purchase.title: Purchase
Purchase.description: Records a user's successful purchase of a product from the rewards shop.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Purchase entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who made the purchase. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Purchase)

productId.description: Reference to the Product that was purchased. (Relationship: Product 1:N Purchase)

purchaseDate.description: The date and time when the purchase was made.

fitCoinsSpent.description: The amount of FIT tokens spent for this specific purchase.

transactionHash.description: The blockchain transaction hash confirming the spending of FIT tokens for this purchase.

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Provides a chronological record of significant user actions and token-related events for display in an activity feed.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ActivityLog entry.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile associated with this activity. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ActivityLog)

description.description: A concise, human-readable description of the activity.

fitCoinsChange.description: The net change in FIT tokens as a result of this activity (positive for earnings, negative for spending).

timestamp.description: The date and time when the activity occurred.

relatedEntityId.description: Optional: Reference to another entity (e.g., Workout ID, Purchase ID) that this activity log entry relates to.

Achievement.title: Achievement
Achievement.description: Defines a specific badge or milestone that users can earn within the FitCoin app.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Achievement entity.

name.description: The name of the achievement, e.g., 'First Workout', '7-Day Streak Master'.

description.description: A description of the criteria required to unlock this achievement.

iconUrl.description: Optional URL to an image representing the achievement badge.

rewardFitCoins.description: The amount of FIT tokens awarded to the user upon unlocking this achievement.

definition.description: Stores the main profile information for a user. Access is restricted to the authenticated user whose UID matches the document ID. The 'id' field in the document matches the '{userId}' path parameter.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Records individual workout sessions for a specific user. Includes denormalized 'userId' field for authorization independence, ensuring `request.resource.data.userId` matches the `{userId}` path parameter for secure access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who logged the workout.

params.name: workoutId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific workout session.

definition.description: Contains definitions of all products available in the rewards shop. This collection is publicly readable by all users, but typically requires administrative privileges for write operations.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific product.

definition.description: Records individual product purchases made by a specific user. Includes denormalized 'userId' field for authorization independence, ensuring `request.resource.data.userId` matches the `{userId}` path parameter for secure access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who made the purchase.

params.name: purchaseId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific purchase transaction.

definition.description: Provides a chronological ledger of significant activities (e.g., logins, workout earnings, purchases) for a specific user. Includes denormalized 'userId' field for authorization independence, ensuring `request.resource.data.userId` matches the `{userId}` path parameter for secure access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user associated with this activity log entry.

params.name: activityLogId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific activity log entry.

definition.description: Defines global achievement badges. This collection is publicly readable by all users, but typically requires administrative privileges for write operations.

params.name: achievementId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific achievement.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore structure for FitCoin adheres strictly to the core design principles to ensure security, scalability, and debuggability. All user-specific data is nested under a top-level `/users/{userId}` collection, leveraging path-based ownership for robust authorization.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL) & Denormalization:**
Each user's primary profile data resides at `/users/{userId}`. Subcollections like `/users/{userId}/workouts`, `/users/{userId}/purchases`, and `/users/{userId}/activityLogs` are directly owned by a specific user. Crucially, every document within these subcollections (e.g., a `Workout` document) includes a `userId` field which explicitly matches the `{userId}` wildcard in its path. This denormalization is vital: it completely eliminates the need for `get()` calls in Firestore Security Rules to check parent document ownership. Rules can simply verify `request.auth.uid == userId` for the specific document or collection being accessed, ensuring atomic operations and preventing rule-based performance bottlenecks or complex debugging scenarios.

**Clarity of Intent & Debuggability:**
The hierarchical path structure (`/users/{userId}/workouts/{workoutId}`) clearly signifies that `workoutId` belongs to `userId`. This makes security rules highly intuitive and easy to write, read, and debug. For instance, a rule for workouts would simply be `allow read, write: if request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.userId;` (or `request.auth.uid == userId` if relying on the path wildcard for `get/update/delete`, and `request.auth.uid == userId` for `list`).

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters) & Structural Segregation:**

1.  **Private User Data:** `/users/{userId}`, `/users/{userId}/workouts`, `/users/{userId}/purchases`, `/users/{userId}/activityLogs` all represent private data accessible only to the authenticated user whose `uid` matches the `{userId}`. This segregation ensures a homogeneous security posture within these collections, making `list` operations performant and secure (e.g., a user can only list *their own* workouts). No filtering is needed at the rule level because the structure inherently restricts access to owned data.
2.  **Public Global Data:** `/products` and `/achievements` are global collections intended for all users to read. These collections have a homogeneous 'public read, admin write' security posture. `list` operations on these collections are naturally QAP-compliant as they are designed to be fully readable by all.

**Fulfillment of User Request:**
*   **Login Record:** Each user login can trigger an update to `UserProfile.lastLoginDate` and generate an `ActivityLog` entry at `/users/{userId}/activityLogs/{activityLogId}` with `activityType: 'LOGIN'`, providing a clear historical ledger.
*   **FitCoins Earned:** `UserProfile.totalFitCoinsEarned` will aggregate lifetime earnings. Individual workout earnings are recorded in `Workout.fitCoinsEarnedTotal` and detailed in `ActivityLog` entries (`activityType: 'WORKOUT_EARN', 'BONUS_EARN'`) with `fitCoinsChange`.
*   **Weekly and Monthly Streak:** The `UserProfile` entity tracks `currentDailyStreak` and `longestDailyStreak`. While explicit weekly/monthly streak fields are not in the provided schema, these can be calculated on the client-side by querying `ActivityLog` entries or `Workout` documents within a specific date range. If direct storage of weekly/monthly streaks were required, new fields in `UserProfile` or a dedicated subcollection (e.g., `/users/{userId}/streaks_summary`) would be added, updated via Cloud Functions.
*   **Score in the Ledger:** The `ActivityLog` subcollection serves as the comprehensive ledger, recording all significant events including token changes, logins, workouts, and purchases, fulfilling the requirement for a transparent record of user activity and earnings.
